title: Chapter XVI.—Watchfulness; The Coming of the Lord

source.title: ANF07. Fathers of the Third and Fourth Centuries: Lactantius, Venantius, Asterius, Victorinus, Dionysius, Apostolic Teaching and Constitutions, Homily, and Liturgies

verses.book: The Teaching of the Twelve Apostles
The Teaching of the Twelve Apostles
verses.text: Let not your lamps be quenched, nor your loins unloosed; but be ye ready, for ye know not the hour in which our Lord cometh.

verses.book: The Teaching of the Twelve Apostles
verses.text: But often shall ye come together, seeking the things which are befitting to your souls: for the whole time of your faith will not profit you, if ye be not made perfect in the last time.

verses.book: The Teaching of the Twelve Apostles
verses.text: For in the last days false prophets and corrupters shall be multiplied, and the sheep shall be turned into wolves, and love shall be turned into hate; 4. for when lawlessness increaseth, they shall hate and persecute and betray one another, and then shall appear the world-deceiver as the Son of God, and shall do signs and wonders, and the earth shall be delivered into his hands, and he shall do iniquitous things which have never yet come to pass since the beginning.

verses.book: The Teaching of the Twelve Apostles
verses.text: Then shall the creation of men come into the fire of trial, and many shall be made to stumble and shall perish; but they that endure in their faith shall be saved from under the curse itself.

verses.book: The Teaching of the Twelve Apostles
verses.text: And then shall appear the signs of the truth; first, the sign of an out-spreading in heaven; then the sign of the sound of the trumpet; and the third, the resurrection of the dead; 7. yet not of all, but as it is said: The Lord shall come and all His saints with Him.

verses.book: The Teaching of the Twelve Apostles
verses.text: Then shall the world see the Lord coming upon the clouds of heaven.
